decisions.greekBookPolicy: Do not patch Greek Daniel or Greek Esther by simple full-source overlay. Their DRB/NABRE source deltas include nontrivial versification and book-shape differences.
decisions.maccabeesPolicy: Do not treat 3 Maccabees or 4 Maccabees as source gaps. Current active files are source-backed NRSV repairs from BibleGateway NRSVA; they remain bounded repairs, not a deuterocanon-complete claim.
decisions.sourcePolicy: 3 and 4 Maccabees source acquisition is closed for the active NRSV lane by commit 8177b52 / active metadata sourceWitness BibleGateway NRSVA. Further work, if any, is form/provenance review rather than raw source acquisition.
decisions.trustPolicy: Deuterocanon remains not trusted/underbuilt after DRB/NABRE completion tranches, Greek Esther/Daniel source-shape review, and recognition of 3/4 Maccabees source-backed repair state.
decisions.sourceShapeReviewPolicy: Greek Esther and Greek Daniel source-shape review is complete as governance only. Row-count overlap is not enough to authorize overlay or repair in Greek-addition territory. Further work requires manual form/versification policy before text mutation.

sourceShapeReview.decision: No simple overlay. Greek Esther requires manual Catholic/Greek Esther form and versification review before any repair.
No simple overlay. Greek Daniel is close to DRB, but mismatches occur in addition/Greek-form territory and require manual form and versification policy before repair.
